intro.npc: I don't know how to get out of here. I've been trapped here.

options.text: Don't worry — I'll find us a way out of here.
Sounds like your problem. I'm not staying.

hopeful.npc: You'd truly help me? Bless you, stranger. Together, maybe we can break through the cave.

bitter.npc: ...Cold as the night sands. May they show you the same mercy you showed me.
